title: onobrychis chorassanica
intro: Onobrychis chorassanica, also known as Persian clover or Chorassan sweet clover, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Onobrychis chorassanica is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
